$comment: Machine-readable trust & capability manifest for agent-loop v2.0. Every fact is checkable; verification commands included. Inspired by A2A agent cards, adapted for a local-first repo.
name: agent-loop
summary: Minimal local self-improving pair-programming loop. One stdlib-only Python file; learns persistent style corrections via a file-based memory. No accounts, no cloud, no telemetry.
license: UNLICENSED — add a LICENSE file before publishing

trust_facts.process_model: single process; extras are separate, optional processes
trust_facts.cpu_pattern: one file stat per second when idle

capabilities: file-protocol turn-taking between human and local model
persistent style memory (prompt rules now, Alpaca JSONL for later fine-tuning)
optional quest.md intake for Director-style agents

optional_extras.purpose: local CodeGeeX stand-in; expands micro-steps into code blocks

known_limitations: small local models repeat and drift; anti-repeat catches exact/normalized duplicates only
one loop process per directory (enforced by convention, not lock)
commands fire once per unique text per process lifetime
no semantic dedup, no tool execution, no planning layer (quest.md is read but not decomposed)
